name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. is a gold royalty company that provides upfront financing to gold mining companies in exchange for the right to purchase a percentage of the gold produced from a mine for the life of the mine. With a portfolio of over 250 royalties, the company focuses on acquiring royalties and streams on low-cost, long-life mines operated by tier-one companies. Sandstorm's diversified asset base provides shareholders with exposure to gold price upside and production growth while minimizing the operational risks and capital costs typically associated with traditional mining companies.
